medical_history.chief_complaint: back pain after fall off ladder
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Mr. ___ is a ___ who fell approximately 6 feet off a ladder on ___. The patient did hit his head but denies any LOC. He noted immediate back pain and was subsequently brought to an OSH where a CT of his torso revealed a 3-column spine injury at the level of T11. The patient was subsequently transferred to ___ where he denied any numbness or tingling. He did endorse pain in his neck and thus was placed in a hard C-collar. The patient does not speak ___ and thus his history was obtained through the use of an interpreter and chart review. CT abdomen from OSH: 3-column spine injury at T11, acute compression fracture of T12.
medical_history.social_history: lives w/ friends and cousins works in ___
